feeding.title: feeding
feeding.existingUpdateTitle: An entry already exists for this round and feed stock.
feeding.existingUpdateDescription: Saving will update the existing value instead of creating a new line. Current quantity: {{qty}} KG, total feed: {{totalKg}} KG.

stockChange.title: Stock Change
stockChange.noSourceBatch: No active batch found in the selected cage.
stockChange.gramInfo: Current grams: {{oldGram}} | To be added: {{increase}} | New total: {{newGram}}

transfer.title: Cage Replacement
transfer.noSourceBatch: No active batch found in the selected cage.
transfer.fullTransferInfo: All transfers are mandatory and open. All living units in the source will be moved.

transferLine.fullTransferInfo: All transfers are mandatory and open. The quantity for this row is fixed as {{count}}.
transferLine.fullTransferRequired: All transfers are mandatory and open. There should be {{count}} in this line.

toast.invalidNewAverageGram: The gram to be added must be greater than 0.
toast.noActiveBatchForCage: No active batch found for the selected cage.
toast.sameCageTransferNotAllowed: The source and target mesh cannot be the same.
toast.transferCountTooHigh: The number of transfers cannot exceed the number of creatures in the cage.
toast.fullTransferRequired: All transfers are mandatory and open. All living units at the source must be moved.
toast.partialTransferToOccupiedCageNotAllowed: Partial transfer cannot be made to a full cage.
toast.partialTransferToOccupiedCageOnlySameBat: Partial transfer to full cage can only be done for the same batch.
toast.sameBatchStockChangeNotAllowed: The target batch cannot be the same as the source batch.
toast.stockChangeCountTooHigh: The number of stock changes cannot exceed the number of creatures in the cage.
toast.shipmentCountTooHigh: The number of shipments cannot exceed the number of creatures in the cage.
toast.cageWarehouseTransferCountTooHigh: The quantity moved from cage to warehouse cannot exceed the live quantity in the cage.
toast.sameWarehouseTransferNotAllowed: Source and target warehouses cannot be the same.
toast.noActiveBatchForWarehouse: No active batch was found for the selected warehouse.
toast.warehouseTransferCountTooHigh: The warehouse transfer quantity cannot exceed the selected batch stock quantity.
toast.warehouseCageTransferCountTooHigh: The quantity moved from warehouse to cage cannot exceed the selected batch stock quantity.

quickDailyEntry.pageDescription: Make your daily operation entries quickly from a single screen.

transferSuccessDialog.title: Transaction Successful
transferSuccessDialog.description: The cage replacement was successfully recorded. The page will be refreshed to update the data.
